articles.title: Inter Milan held 0-0 at Como in 1st leg of Italian Cup semifinals
articles.original_title: Inter Milan held 0-0 at Como in 1st leg of Italian Cup semifinals
articles.summary: COMO, Italy (AP) — Inter Milan was held to a 0-0 draw at neighboring Como in the first leg of the Italian Cup semifinals Tuesday.Como had the better chances but couldn’t quite find the target. The second leg is scheduled for April 22.Lazio plays Atalanta on Wednesday in the other semifinal.Inter, which faces AC Milan in a derby on Sunday, rested several usual starters.Inter has won the Italian Cup nine times, while Como is chasing its first top-level trophy.___AP soccer: https://apnews.com/hub/s

articles.original_title: Cardinals inform 2-time Pro Bowl QB Kyler Murray they plan to release him next week, AP source says
articles.summary: The Arizona Cardinals have informed two-time Pro Bowl quarterback Kyler Murray that they plan to release him at the beginning of the new league year on March 11, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press.
